tasks.title: Ensure application builds and runs successfully
tasks.description: Verify the application can build and run without errors. Check that 'npm install' completes successfully, 'npm run build' produces a valid build, and 'npm run dev' starts the development server. Review package.json scripts, vite.config.js, and tsconfig.json for any misconfigurations. Fix any dependency issues, build errors, or runtime errors that prevent the app from running. Test that the app is accessible in a browser and renders the home page correctly.
acceptance_criteria: npm run dev starts the development server
App is accessible and renders without console errors

tasks.title: Validate application runs and tests pass
tasks.description: Run the complete validation suite: execute 'npx vitest run' to verify all tests pass, run 'npm run build' to verify the build succeeds, and run 'npm run dev' to verify the dev server starts successfully. Confirm zero test failures and no build errors.
acceptance_criteria: All tests pass with npx vitest run
Dev server starts and app loads successfully
